column6:
ADDED PROX FILTER
Filters out all prox badges

- SAM AV3 Required...all keys stored in the crypto module
- Enable Customer configuation over OSDP and bin files
- Mifare DESFire SmartMax app supported
- "Reset to default loaded configuration" is disabled
- Firmware is capable of being updated from the panel
- yellow-dot sticker on bottom right edge/right side of the reader and on the box
-Ships as ignoring BLE functions (Admin and Credentials), if BLE is enabled at a later date, device works with Symmetry Blue (requires 5044-FEA-BLE-011: Enable BLE Admin and Credentials Functionality)        
                
                
F2F 1.4.5.0 CBA5 has a bit set that may have wallet credential issues with specific devices (extremly rare). Future firmware configs and WS do not have this issue as a wrapper is used.
                
                
CBA6 is only loaded onto 1.4.5.1 or 1.5.0.1 FW (Custom FW versions to identify the reader has prox disabled to BoA via AMAG SW. #.#.#.1 notifies them prox is disabled as the reader has been updated to a firmware version with the configuration that contains prox disabled by default)

column2: Filter all prox cards except for 40-bit and all 1's

NOTE: BLE IS IGNORED OUT OF THE BOX!!!

If enabled using a config card/bin file: The reader will use the Symmetry Blue AMAG Credential
(Requires 5044-FEA-BLE-011: Enable BLE Admin and Credentials Functionality)
